reference: Hi, my question is that I have pain in my back. I do tree work for a living and have fallen from a few trees. Doctors cannot find anything broken, but the pain is still present even when I am relaxed, lying down, sitting, etc. What should I do about this ongoing pain?
text: Hi, my question is that I have pain in my back. I do tree work for a living and have fallen from a few trees. Doctors cannot find anything broken, but the pain is still present even when I am relaxed, lying down, sitting, etc. What should I do about this ongoing pain?
